List available cortical surfaces

Source: R/cortical.R
available_cortical_surfaces.Rd

List available cortical surfaces

Usage

available_cortical_surfaces()

Value

Character vector of available surface names.

Examples

available_cortical_surfaces()
#> [1] "pial"          "white"         "semi-inflated" "sphere"       
#> [5] "smoothwm"      "orig"

On this page
